captions: modern Punjabi pop, heavy dhol, bass-heavy beat, energetic male vocals, party anthem, bhangra fusion, celebratory
Punjabi hip hop, trap beats with dhol, aggressive flow, bass drops, urban Punjabi, hard-hitting, street energy
bhangra dance track, traditional tumbi, dhol rhythm, high energy, wedding party vibes, joyful, uplifting chorus
modern desi pop, Punjabi vocals, electronic production, catchy melody, club-ready, fusion of east and west
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Dhol vajje te nachdi kudiye
Saara shehar nachda tere naal
Patiala shahi suit tera
Taare vi sharmaye tere naal

[Chorus]
Balle balle nach le
Pairon vich ghungroo bajale
Aaj di raat hai apni
Duniya nu bhulake nachle

[Verse 2]
Gabru jawan dil da ni
Tere liye pagal hoye
DJ utte gaana vajje
Sab nachde hoye hoye

[Chorus]
Balle balle nach le
Pairon vich ghungroo bajale
Aaj di raat hai apni
Duniya nu bhulake nachle

[Outro]
Balle balle
Hoye hoye nach le
